description: 50 English E2E stress sets; each ≥8 turns; uses wearable screenshots, warehouse lipids/wearables, prior lab images, and prior PHA samples. Seed via PHA_E2E_BANK_SEED.

colloquial: Attached are today's Apple Watch metrics; morning workout was resistance training — can I train tomorrow, and what type?
Uploading my wearable screenshots — did strength work this morning; should I rest or train tomorrow?
Here are today's body metrics; AM resistance workout done — good to exercise tomorrow? Any type tips?
Apple Watch panels attached; morning was strength — advise tomorrow's training suitability and type.
formal: Attached are today's wearable body metrics. Note: this morning's workout was resistance training. Please assess whether tomorrow is suitable for exercise and, if so, recommend exercise types.
I uploaded today's Apple Watch screenshots. After morning resistance training, please evaluate tomorrow's exercise suitability and suggest types.

colloquial: Attached is a lab/report image from my PHA library — please parse lipids and key values.
Here's a medical report screenshot I previously saved — extract cholesterol and LDL if present.
formal: Please analyze the attached lab/report image and extract lipid panel values when available.
Attached medical report image — parse key lipid metrics and cite any dates found.
Is my HRV within a normal range?

colloquial: Sleep numbers look wrong — re-check them.
Re-verify today's sleep from the screenshots.
Sleep ledger seems off, please re-parse.
formal: Please verify today's sleep data; if wrong, re-analyze the screenshots.
Re-check the sleep values from the uploaded panels.

colloquial: Where does the workout count of 8 come from?
formal: Where does the recent workout count come from?
Please explain the workout count data source.

colloquial: How many workout days in the last 4 weeks?
formal: How many days did I exercise in the last 4 weeks?
Report mean daily steps from warehouse.
What else should I pay attention to?
Is HRV within a normal range?
Please assess whether HRV is normal.
How does this compare to last week?
Please compare with the prior week.
Is the day after tomorrow suitable for exercise?
Assess exercise suitability for the following day.
What running duration do you recommend?

colloquial: Do I need to re-upload sleep screenshots to re-parse?
Can you re-parse sleep without re-upload?
formal: Can you re-parse the sleep screenshot data? Do I need to upload again?
Please re-analyze workout data from the uploaded screenshots.
Is respiratory rate within normal range?
Please report workout heart rate range.
What was the exercise HR range?
How is my heart rate overall?

colloquial: How has my recent HRV been?
formal: Please query recent HRV from the warehouse.
Report recent 90-day HRV mean if available.
Summarize recent sleep from stored data.
Summarize recent steps from stored data.
Summarize lipid history from the warehouse.
Please combine screenshot and warehouse evidence for HRV.
Synthesize HRV across uploaded and stored data.
Which metrics are abnormal or need attention?
How do lipids trend across years?

colloquial: Any supplement notes from my PHA data?
Supplements I should consider given lipids/HRV?
formal: Please review supplement-related facts if present in my warehouse.
Any evidence-based supplement cautions from my records?

colloquial: Any body age / recovery age signal?
formal: If available, comment on body-age or recovery-age related signals.

colloquial: This is not medical advice, right?
formal: Please keep the reply educational and non-diagnostic.
Confirm this is not a medical diagnosis.
Respond in English for all subsequent turns.

colloquial: I already imported wearable data before — use warehouse.
Rely on previously ingested wearable samples.
formal: Please use previously ingested wearable data in the warehouse.
Query historical wearable samples already stored in PHA.

colloquial: If I previously uploaded a lab PDF, use those lipids.
Pull lipid values from prior PDF/report ingest if available.
formal: Please use previously ingested lab PDF / report lipid values when available.
Query prior PDF/report ingest for lipid panel values.
